title: Terroristi a Madrid
writer: Margarita Alexandre, José Luis Barbero, Mercedes Formica
actors: Cosetta Greco, Fausto Tozzi, María Dolores Pradera
plot: Rafael, an ex-exiled republican of the Spanish Civil War, returns to his native city after the years and in the company of his fellow maquis (members of the Resistance) with the mission of carrying out an armed action against Fran...
